hero.description: I build production-grade web platforms — from SaaS products and e-commerce systems to API integrations. Specializing in Next.js, NestJS, and scalable architecture that grows with your business.
hero.whatIDoSubtitle: Turning complex requirements into elegant, high-performance web applications — built for scale, designed for humans.
hero.serviceFullStackDesc: End-to-end web applications — from pixel-perfect frontends with React & Next.js to robust backends with NestJS and PostgreSQL.
hero.serviceAPIDesc: RESTful and GraphQL APIs designed for reliability. Third-party integrations, payment gateways, and real-time communication systems.
hero.servicePerfDesc: Optimized architecture with caching, load balancing, and monitoring — ensuring your platform stays fast as it grows.
hero.ctaDescription: Whether you need a new platform, a custom web app, or a reliable development partner — I'm ready to help turn your vision into reality.
